% This is generated by ESQL's RangeMinTests. Do not edit it. See docs/reference/query-languages/esql/README.md for how to regenerate it.

### RANGE MIN
Returns the minimum (start) value of a date_range. For a date_range [x, y), it returns x.

```esql
FROM decades
| WHERE decade == 1900
| EVAL min_bound = RANGE_MIN(date_range)
| KEEP date_range, min_bound
```
